_doc: Brand Resolver input contract for phase 2. Documents the real inputs feeding resolveBrandDomain() and the gating around its call site in searchDiscovery(). Updated 2026-03-16.
schema_version: brand_resolver_input.runtime.v1 - boundary is resolveBrandDomain({ brand, category, config, callLlmFn, storage }) in brandResolver.js:1-52.

call_boundary.brand: SOURCE: searchDiscovery.js:181-187 passes variables.brand, which comes from the phase identity lock. searchDiscovery.js:169-171 skips the resolver when brand is empty.
call_boundary.category: SOURCE: searchDiscovery.js:181-187 passes variables.category, derived from job.category || categoryConfig.category.
call_boundary.config: SOURCE: searchDiscovery.js:181-187 passes config through unchanged. resolveBrandDomain() itself only forwards config into callLlmFn; the main LLM gating happens before the call.
call_boundary.callLlmFn: SOURCE: searchDiscovery.js:144-149 constructs createBrandResolverCallLlm(...) only when hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'triage' }) returns true. Otherwise null is passed and resolveBrandDomain() stays cache/empty only.
call_boundary.storage: SOURCE: searchDiscovery.js:181-187 passes storage through unchanged for cache read/write via getBrandDomain() and upsertBrandDomain().

runtime_gates.missing_brand: SOURCE: searchDiscovery.js:169-171 sets skip_reason = 'no_brand_in_identity_lock' and does not call resolveBrandDomain() when variables.brand is empty.
runtime_gates.triage_api_key: SOURCE: searchDiscovery.js:144-149 requires hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'triage' }) before constructing callLlmFn. The adapter still routes over the plan-model stack via modelOverride.
runtime_gates.cache_short_circuit: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:14-25 returns cached official_domain/support_domain/aliases immediately when storage.getBrandDomain(brandKey, categoryKey) yields a row.
runtime_gates.llm_fallback: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:27 returns the empty output object when callLlmFn is null.
runtime_gates.error_fallback: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:51-54 returns the empty output object on any resolver exception.

storage_contract.getBrandDomain: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:14-25 expects storage.getBrandDomain(brandKey, categoryKey) to return cached official_domain, aliases, support_domain, and optionally confidence.
storage_contract.cached_aliases_shape: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:17 and parseAliases() at 56-64 accepts either a JSON string or an array for cached aliases.
storage_contract.upsertBrandDomain: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:40-49 writes brand, category, official_domain, aliases as a JSON string, support_domain, and confidence = 0.8 after an LLM resolution.

llm_adapter_contract.role: SOURCE: createBrandResolverCallLlm() in discoveryLlmAdapters.js:46-64 uses role = 'triage' and reason = 'brand_resolution'. 'triage' is a compatibility label; routing still resolves through the plan-model contract.
llm_adapter_contract.model: SOURCE: discoveryLlmAdapters.js:49-53 chooses _resolvedBrandResolverReasoningModel or _resolvedBrandResolverBaseModel, falling back to llmModelReasoning / llmModelPlan / llmPlanFallbackModel. The retired llmModelTriage / llmModelFast keys are no longer authoritative.
llm_adapter_contract.system_prompt: SOURCE: discoveryLlmAdapters.js:72-77 asks for the official domain, aliases, support subdomain, and a short reasoning array.
llm_adapter_contract.json_schema: SOURCE: brandResolverSchema() in discoveryLlmAdapters.js:1-13 requires official_domain and allows aliases, support_domain, and reasoning.

normalization.brand_trim: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:7 trims brand into brandKey.
normalization.category_trim: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:8 trims category into categoryKey.
normalization.official_domain: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:36 lowercases and trims the LLM result.
normalization.aliases: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:37 lowercases, trims, and filters empty alias strings.
normalization.support_domain: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:38 lowercases and trims the LLM result.
normalization.reasoning: SOURCE: brandResolver.js:39 trims reasoning strings and filters empty entries.

details.status: CLOSED — host_hints is not a real gap. Brand Resolver returns officialDomain + aliases; host hints are synthesized downstream at searchDiscovery.js:373-378. No code expects or reads a dedicated host_hints input to the brand resolver.
INFO - resolveBrandDomain() receives the full config object even though only the LLM adapter meaningfully uses it.
INFO - Brand Resolver has no dedicated persisted input artifact; the contract exists in memory only.
